requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Egypt-Specific Inverter Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 50 Hz 电网频率与埃及专用逆变器设置
requirement_topic.zht: 50 Hz 電網頻率與埃及專用逆變器設定

summary.en: Egyptian grid-connected PV inverters must be configured for the local AC network and the applicable EgyptERA grid-connection code. The frequency setting should be treated as an Egypt project parameter, including permitted operating range, trip thresholds, reconnection logic, and any grid-support functions required by the network operator.
summary.zh: 埃及并网光伏逆变器必须按当地交流电网和适用 EgyptERA 并网规范进行配置。频率设置应作为埃及项目参数处理，包括允许运行范围、跳闸阈值、重连逻辑，以及网络运营方要求的任何电网支撑功能。
summary.zht: 埃及併網光伏逆變器必須按當地交流電網和適用 EgyptERA 併網規範進行配置。頻率設定應作為埃及項目參數處理，包括允許運行範圍、跳脫閾值、重連邏輯，以及網路營運方要求的任何電網支撐功能。

standards_or_laws: EgyptERA medium- and high-voltage solar station connection code

summary.en: China is also a 50 Hz market, so the nameplate frequency may look aligned. The gap is not nominal frequency alone; it is the project-specific protection settings and grid-support behavior required by Egyptian codes and the receiving network operator.
summary.zh: 中国同样是 50 Hz 市场，因此铭牌频率可能看似一致。差距不只是标称频率，而是埃及规范和接入网络运营方要求的项目专用保护设置和电网支撑行为。
summary.zht: 中國同樣是 50 Hz 市場，因此銘牌頻率可能看似一致。差距不只是標稱頻率，而是埃及規範和接入網路營運方要求的項目專用保護設定和電網支撐行為。

gap.en: Do not ship only a China default firmware profile. Prepare an Egypt configuration profile, locked parameter list, commissioning record, protection-setting report, and installer instructions showing that the model can meet the approved Egyptian project settings.
gap.zh: 不要仅以中国默认固件配置出货。应准备埃及配置档案、锁定参数清单、调试记录、保护设置报告和安装方说明，以证明该型号可满足已批准的埃及项目设置。
gap.zht: 不要僅以中國預設韌體配置出貨。應準備埃及配置檔案、鎖定參數清單、調試記錄、保護設定報告和安裝方說明，以證明該型號可滿足已批准的埃及項目設定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installation where EgyptERA/EETC/distribution-company connection approval specifies frequency and protection settings
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese grid-connected installation; nominal 50 Hz compatibility does not equal Egypt project approval

source.publisher: Egyptian Electric Utility and Consumer Protection Regulatory Agency (EgyptERA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] 50 Hz nameplate compatibility is not enough. Egypt-specific grid-code settings and commissioning evidence should be prepared for each grid-connected project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50 Hz 铭牌兼容性并不足够。每个并网项目都应准备埃及专用并网规范设置和调试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50 Hz 銘牌相容性並不足夠。每個併網項目都應準備埃及專用併網規範設定和調試證據。
